scripts.swarm: concurrently -n "INFRA,LINA,VIGIL,CORTEX,NOVA,ASTRA,BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "gray,magenta,yellow,blue,magenta,white,green,cyan" "docker-compose up" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/lina/lina.py dev" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/vigil/vigil.py dev" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/bi/bi_agent.py dev" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/nova/nova.py dev" "cd python-agent && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe agents/astra/astra.py dev" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
